content.content: Professional travel blogger and photographer known across the web as Swedish Nomad. His incredible images published to his Instagram account have earned him 110,000 followers. His first Instagram photo, published in November of 2015, was taken at the Yi Peng Lanna Festival in Chiang Mai, Thailand. He became an ambassador for the flight price comparison company Momondo. He's traveled the globe alongside his girlfriend Christine, AKA AlienChris. He andDan Carterboth use Instagram as a place to blog about their travels.
